en.text: from ἀγγέλλω (probably derived from G0071; compare G0034) (to bring tidings); a messenger; especially an "angel"; by implication, a pastor

senses.gloss_en: from ἀγγέλλω (probably derived from G0071; compare G0034) (to bring tidings); a messenger; especially an "angel"; by implication, a pastor
